subject: A quick thought for The Streetwear Studio
body:
Hi Ben,

We know how busy things get running a brand like The Streetwear Studio, so we'll keep this brief.

We've been thinking about your focus on in-store and kerbside pickup, and how important quality and availability are for your customers. We believe our premium hoodies and T-shirts, known for their consistent quality and reliable delivery to the UK, could be a great fit.

To make things easier, we'd like to offer you a free sample of any garment you're interested in - no strings attached. It's a simple way for you to experience our quality firsthand.

Would you be open to a quick chat next week to discuss this, or perhaps just let us know which samples you'd like to receive?

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: Quick follow-up + Free Sample Offer for Viggo
body:
Hi Marin,

We know how busy things get running an in-store and delivery business like Viggo, so we'll keep this brief.

Our team at Bassi Clothing specializes in premium garment manufacturing with reliable EU/UK delivery, offering flexible MOQs from 300 pieces. We believe our Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100-day lead time, from $7.00 USD FOB) or Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, 22-day lead time, from $5.00 USD FOB) could be a great fit for your brand.

To demonstrate our quality firsthand, we'd love to send you a few free samples relevant to Viggo's style, completely without obligation. It's a no-pressure way to see the Bassi difference.

Would you be open to a quick chat next week to discuss this, or simply let us know your preferred sample styles?

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A Quick Hello from Bassi Clothing - No Obligation Samples for MURMUR
body:
Hi Andreea,

We understand how busy things get at MURMUR, and we appreciate you taking a moment to read this.

We believe our premium garment manufacturing could significantly benefit your unique vision, particularly with our expertise in high-quality basics that underpin elegant collections. To make it easy, we'd like to offer you a complimentary sample pack - no strings attached. It's the best way to experience our quality firsthand.

We could include samples of:

*   T-Shirts & Polo Shirts (MOQ 500, lead time 22 days, price 5.50-7.50 USD FOB)
*   Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, lead time 22 days, price 5.00-7.00 USD FOB)

Would you be open to receiving these free samples? Just a quick reply of 'yes' is all we need, and we'll handle the rest.

We look forward to potentially collaborating and helping MURMUR continue to redefine women's fashion.

Best regards,
The Bassi Clothing Team

www.bassiclothing.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: Quick follow-up for Entrance Store - Free Sample Opportunity
body:
Hi Coca,

We know you're incredibly busy running Entrance Store, and we appreciate you taking a moment to read this.

We've reached out a couple of times, and we wanted to offer something tangible without any commitment: free samples of our premium garments. We believe seeing and feeling our quality firsthand is the best way to understand the Bassi Clothing difference.

Given Entrance Store's focus on trendy, high-end apparel, we think our Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100-day lead time, 7.00-10.00 USD FOB) or our T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90-day lead time, 4.00-6.00 USD FOB) could be a great fit for your brand.

Would you be open to a quick call next week to discuss which samples would be most relevant for Entrance Store? We're simply looking to introduce our quality, with no pressure to commit to an order.

We look forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
The Bassi Clothing Team

www.bassiclothing.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A Quick Hello from Bassi Clothing (No Commitment)
body:
Hi Emina,

We know how busy things get at Peek & Cloppenburg, and we don't want to take up too much of your valuable time.

We've previously reached out about our premium garment manufacturing and reliable delivery to Europe. We believe our flexible MOQs (as low as 300 pieces for hoodies and sweatshirts) and structured 90-100 day production turnaround could genuinely benefit your operations, especially compared to the longer lead times from some Far East suppliers.

To make it easy for you to experience our quality firsthand, we'd love to send you some FREE samples of our:

*   Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100-day lead time)
*   T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90-day lead time)
*   Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, 22-day lead time)

There's absolutely no commitment required. Just let us know a good address at AFI Palace Cotroceni, Bulevardul General Paul Teodorescu 4, 061344 București, Romania, and we'll handle the rest.

We look forward to the possibility of connecting and understanding how we can support Peek & Cloppenburg's manufacturing needs.

Best regards,

The Bassi Clothing Team

subject: Quick follow-up for Canali Boutique: Free Samples?
body:
Hi Michele,

We understand you're incredibly busy, and we've reached out a couple of times already. We don't want to take up much of your time, but we believe we could be a valuable partner for Canali Boutique.

To show you the quality we offer firsthand, we'd like to send you some complimentary samples of our premium garments - completely free of charge and with no obligation whatsoever. We're confident you'll be impressed with the craftsmanship.

Given Canali Boutique's focus on quality, we think our Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, starting at $7.00 USD FOB) or our T-Shirts (MOQ 500, starting at $4.00 USD FOB) would be a great starting point.

Would you be open to receiving a small selection of samples? A quick reply with your preferred styles and shipping address is all we need.

We look forward to potentially collaborating with Canali Boutique and helping you elevate your garment sourcing.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A Quick Thought for Hawes & Curtis: Premium Garments, Simplified
body:
Hi Peter,

We understand how busy things get at Hawes & Curtis, and we wanted to reach out one last time with a straightforward offer.

We believe our premium garment manufacturing could be a strong fit for your brand's commitment to quality and value. To make it easy to see for yourselves, we'd be happy to send you a complimentary sample of our:

*   T-Shirts (MOQ 500, from $4.00 USD FOB)
*   Polo Shirts (MOQ 500, from $5.50 USD FOB)

There's absolutely no commitment involved. It's just an opportunity for you to experience our quality firsthand. Would you be open to receiving a sample?

We look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
The Team at Bassi Clothing

company: Onitsuka Tiger Regent Street, London Flagship
subject: A Quick Hello from Bassi Clothing (No Strings Attached)
body:
Hi Ryutaro,

We understand you're incredibly busy managing the Onitsuka Tiger Regent Street flagship, and we've reached out a couple of times without a reply. We completely get it.

Instead of another long email, we wanted to offer something tangible: free samples of our premium T-shirts or Hoodies, custom-made to your specifications, with absolutely no commitment. We believe seeing our quality firsthand is the best way to understand our value.

We could see our high-quality Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100-day lead time, from $7.00-$10.00 USD FOB) or T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90-day lead time, from $4.00-$6.00 USD FOB) being a strong fit for Onitsuka Tiger's commitment to quality.

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute call next week to discuss this, or simply let us know your preferred garment type for a sample? We're here to make it easy.

We are at Bassi Clothing, and we are committed to being a reliable partner for UK and European fashion retailers. We offer premium quality garment manufacturing with reliable EU/UK delivery, ensuring your brand maintains its high standards. Our focus is on providing transparent pricing, consistent quality, and efficient production turnaround times.

We look forward to the possibility of connecting.

Sincerely,
The Team at Bassi Clothing

subject: Quick follow-up for ME+EM: complimentary samples?
body:
Hi Jane,

We understand how busy things get at ME+EM, and we've reached out a couple of times already. We don't want to take up too much of your valuable time, but we believe we could be a strong partner for your brand's manufacturing needs.

Instead of another long email, we'd love to offer something tangible: a selection of complimentary samples from our core range, delivered directly to you with no obligation. This would be a great way for you to experience our premium quality firsthand, especially for items like our sustainable/organic cotton garments (MOQ 300, 22-day lead time, $5.00-7.00 USD FOB) or perhaps some of our premium T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90-day lead time, $4.00-6.00 USD FOB) that align with your stylish yet relaxed aesthetic.

Would you be open to receiving these samples? Just reply to this email, and we'll handle the rest.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: Quick question about your next collection, The White Company
body:
Hi Holly,

We understand you're incredibly busy managing the beautiful collections at The White Company, and we appreciate you taking a moment to read this.

We've been admiring your brand's commitment to quality and style, and we believe our premium garment manufacturing capabilities could be a valuable asset to your upcoming ranges. Specifically, our expertise in high-quality T-Shirts (MOQ 500, from $4.00 USD FOB) and Hoodies (MOQ 300, from $7.00 USD FOB) could align perfectly with your aesthetic.

We'd love to send you a complimentary sample pack of our premium cotton fabrics and finished garments, entirely free and with no obligation whatsoever. It's a quick way to experience our quality firsthand without any commitment.

Would you be open to receiving these samples? A simple 'yes' is all we need, and we'll handle the rest.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A quick thought for Vivienne Westwood Worlds End
body:
Hi Chiara,

We know how busy things get at Vivienne Westwood Worlds End, and we've reached out a couple of times without a reply, which is completely understandable.

However, we genuinely believe our premium garment manufacturing could be a strong fit for your brand's unique aesthetic and quality standards. We specialize in high-quality items like Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 7.00-10.00 USD FOB) and Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, 5.00-7.00 USD FOB), all with reliable 90-100 day production turnarounds.

Instead of another email, how about we send you a few free samples relevant to your collection? There's absolutely no commitment, just an opportunity to experience our quality firsthand.

Would you be open to receiving a small package from us?

Best regards,
The Bassi Clothing Team

subject: Quick question for [Prospect's Company Name]
body:
Hi John,

We understand you're incredibly busy, and our previous emails might have caught you at a bad time.

However, we believe the quality and reliability Bassi Clothing offers could significantly benefit your brand, located at 46 Chiltern St, London W1U 7QR.

Instead of another long email, we'd love to simply send you a few complimentary samples - perhaps a hoodie or a high-quality T-shirt - so you can experience our premium manufacturing firsthand. There's no commitment whatsoever.

Would you be open to receiving a small package from us?

Best regards,

The Team at Bassi Clothing

--- 

We are Bassi Clothing, a premium garment manufacturer specializing in reliable, high-quality production for UK and European fashion retailers. We offer competitive pricing, flexible MOQs (as low as 300 pieces), and a structured 90-100 day production turnaround. Our factory is SEDEX 4 Pillar and Zedd silver certified, ensuring ethical and compliant manufacturing. We handle all logistics, providing a seamless experience from design consultation to delivery at your warehouse. Visit our website or reply to this email to learn more.

subject: A quick thought for SP Workwear - Free Sample Offer
body:
Hi Matt,

We know you're incredibly busy running SP Workwear, and we've reached out a couple of times already. We understand that finding reliable manufacturing partners takes time and trust.

Instead of another email, we'd like to offer something tangible: a free sample pack of our premium garments, tailored to what we believe would be a great fit for your brand's in-store and delivery offerings.

Imagine seeing and feeling the quality of our Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100-day lead time, from $7.00 USD FOB) or our T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90-day lead time, from $4.00 USD FOB) without any commitment.

Would you be open to receiving a few complimentary samples from us? It's a no-pressure way to experience our quality firsthand.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A quick thought for goodJo luxury vintage
body:
Hi,

We know you're incredibly busy curating exceptional pieces for goodJo luxury vintage. We've reached out a couple of times and wanted to offer something tangible without any commitment.

Would you be open to receiving a few complimentary samples of our premium blank T-Shirts (MOQ 500, from $4.00 USD FOB) or Hoodies (MOQ 300, from $7.00 USD FOB)? We believe seeing our quality firsthand could be valuable.

If you're interested, please just reply "Yes" and we'll handle the rest.

We are confident we can be a valuable partner for goodJo luxury vintage, providing premium quality garment manufacturing with reliable EU/UK delivery, competitive pricing, and full compliance with UK/EU quality standards.

We look forward to connecting and exploring how Bassi Clothing can support your brand's growth.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A Quick Hello from Bassi Clothing (ReSee Boutique)
body:

We know you're incredibly busy curating exceptional pieces for ReSee Boutique, and we respect your time.

We've reached out a couple of times, and while we understand if garment manufacturing isn't a current priority, we wanted to offer something tangible with absolutely no obligation: free samples.

subject: A quick thought for Le Manoir Luxury
body:
Hi,

We know how busy things get at Le Manoir Luxury, and we've reached out a couple of times without a response. We completely understand.

However, we wanted to offer something tangible without any commitment: free samples of our premium quality garments, delivered directly to you. We believe seeing and feeling our quality firsthand is the best way to understand the Bassi difference.

Perhaps a sample of our sustainable organic cotton T-shirts (MOQ 300, lead time 22 days, price 5.00-7.00 USD FOB) or a luxurious hoodie (MOQ 300, lead time 100 days, price 8.00-12.00 USD FOB) would be a good starting point?

If this sparks any interest, please just hit reply. We'd be happy to arrange a sample delivery at your convenience, with no strings attached.

We understand your time is valuable, and we appreciate you considering Bassi Clothing as a potential partner. We hope to hear from you soon and explore how we can support Le Manoir Luxury's commitment to quality and design.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A quick thought for Fauré Le Page
body:
Hi Nicolas,

We understand you're incredibly busy, and our previous emails might have caught you at a bad time.

However, we believe our premium garment manufacturing could genuinely complement Fauré Le Page's commitment to exceptional quality.

The Team at Bassi Clothing

subject: A Quick Thought for Luxury Dress Code
body:
Hi

We understand how busy things get at Luxury Dress Code, and we've reached out a couple of times already. No pressure at all, but we had a quick thought we believe could be valuable.

For your sophisticated ready-to-wear lines, we specialize in premium quality garments with flexible MOQs starting as low as 300 pieces for items like Hoodies & Sweatshirts (from $7.00-$10.00 USD FOB) and even sustainable/organic cotton options (from $5.00-$7.00 USD FOB).

If you're open to exploring new manufacturing options, we'd be pleased to send you some sample garments tailored to your brand's aesthetic, completely free and with no commitment. It's a simple way to experience our quality firsthand.

Would you be open to a brief chat to discuss this further?

Best regards,
The Bassi Clothing Team

At Bassi Clothing, we are dedicated to fostering strong, long-term partnerships built on trust and mutual success. We understand the dynamic nature of the fashion industry and are committed to providing agile, high-quality manufacturing solutions that help your brand thrive. Our goal is to simplify your supply chain, ensuring consistent quality and timely delivery so you can focus on what you do best: creating exceptional fashion. We look forward to the possibility of collaborating with Luxury Dress Code and supporting your continued growth.
